---
title: "Figure 5 (macro_IR) — channel-normalised covariance vs interval, by N_ch, param and noise"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
Per-recording parameter variance MULTIPLIED by the channel number, N_ch * var(N_ch), as a function of the
measurement interval, one curve per N_ch, in a parameter x noise grid. The N_ch factor removes the trivial
1/N scaling: if the information were linear in channels the curves for different N_ch would COLLAPSE onto
one; the spread between them is exactly the sub-linearity (the loss from concentrating channels). Rates
collapse (linear); i and N_ch spread (sub-linear), more so at coarse interval and low noise. macro_IR,
1c2ae6f, Gaussian_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance diagonal; noise levels present in the run; free y per parameter row.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r data}
COV      <- "Probit_statistics_Gaussian_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance"
PIDX     <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB<- c(on = "log[10]~k[on]", off = "log[10]~k[off]",
              unitary_current = "log[10]~i", Num_ch_mean = "log[10]~N[ch]")

read_dir <- function(z) map_dfr(Sys.glob(sprintf(
  "../data/1c2ae6f/figure_3_G_nch_*_nsim_10000_macro_IR_noise_%s_battery_pool_G.csv", z)),
  ~ read.csv(.x, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)) %>% mutate(noise = z)
NOISES <- c("0.1", "1", "10")
d <- map_dfr(NOISES, read_dir)

dd <- d %>%
  filter(component_path == COV, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
         param_index == param_col, param_index %in% PIDX) %>%
  mutate(param_name = names(PIDX)[match(param_index, PIDX)]) %>%
  group_by(noise, param_name, Num_ch, interval_in_tau) %>%
  summarise(var = mean(value), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(normcov = Num_ch * var,
         nch_f  = factor(Num_ch),
         noisef = factor(paste("noise", noise), levels = paste("noise", NOISES)),
         param  = factor(param_name, levels = names(PIDX), labels = unname(PARAM_LAB)))
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 7.5, fig.height = 8.5}
g <- ggplot(dd, aes(interval_in_tau, normcov, colour = nch_f, group = nch_f)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = .5) + geom_point(size = .8) +
  facet_grid(param ~ noisef, scales = "free_y", labeller = labeller(param = label_parsed)) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(.01, .1, 1)) + scale_y_log10() +
  scale_colour_viridis_d(name = expression(N[ch]), end = .92, direction = -1) +
  labs(x = expression(Delta / tau[min]),
       y = expression(N[ch]%*%"per-recording variance   (channel-normalised covariance)")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9, base_family = "Helvetica") +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), legend.position = "right",
        axis.text = element_text(size = 7), axis.title = element_text(size = 8.5),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 8))
g
ggsave("Figure_5_IR_normcov_noise.pdf", g, width = 7.5, height = 8.5)
```
